scripts.build: which forge > /dev/null 2>&1 && mud build || echo Skipping contracts build - Foundry not available
scripts.seed:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/seed-game-data.ts'
scripts.seed:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/seed-game-data.ts'
scripts.zone:load:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/zone-loader.ts'
scripts.zone:load:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/zone-loader.ts'
scripts.item:verify:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/item-sync.ts'
scripts.item:verify:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/item-sync.ts'
scripts.item:sync:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/item-sync.ts --update'
scripts.item:sync:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/item-sync.ts --update'
scripts.deploy:local: pnpm run build && DEBUG=mud:* mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow --priority-gas-price=1000000" --profile=mudFoundry
scripts.deploy:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && pnpm run build && mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow" --profile=base-mainnet --worldAddress $WORLD_ADDRESS'
scripts.deploy:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && pnpm run build && mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow" --profile=base-mainnet --worldAddress $WORLD_ADDRESS'
scripts.ensure-access:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && forge script script/EnsureAccess.s.sol --tc EnsureAccess --sig "run(address)" $WORLD_ADDRESS --rpc-url $RPC_URL --broadcast'
scripts.ensure-access:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && forge script script/EnsureAccess.s.sol --tc EnsureAccess --sig "run(address)" $WORLD_ADDRESS --rpc-url $RPC_URL --broadcast'
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && DEBUG=mud:* mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow --priority-gas-price=1000000" --profile=mudFoundry && CHAIN_ID=31337
scripts.lint: pnpm run prettier && pnpm run solhint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run prettier && pnpm lint:sol-tests --fix  && yarn lint:sol-logic --fix
